notes: NarrationBuffer in Rust, tee PTY bytes, emit narration-digest events with narrate- id prefix
sandbox-files-changed annotates narration buffer via annotate_file_changes
What's happening commentary panel in PiPanel; narrate- responses routed to commentary
Narrate toggle in TerminalPanel header; terminal_set_narration_enabled command
narration.digest events appended to journal.jsonl via backend narration-digest listener
Infrastructure complete; manual end-to-end validation with Claude Code in PTY required to confirm narration feels better than raw terminal
review.rs module with ReviewSession lifecycle (start/approve/reject/close) and lazy baseline; verified via acceptance checks + cargo check clean
Recreated docs/design/narration-sidecar.md and changeset-review.md from implemented narration.rs/review.rs code + revamp plan; anchors match backlog design_refs
ensure_baseline pre-write hooks present in file_ops.rs (write/rename/move paths); cargo check clean
polling.rs feeds external changes via observe_external_change and emits changeset-updated; cargo check clean
Added review event-kind constants to journal.rs and wired review.rs to use them; ReviewPanel mounted in App.tsx; cargo check clean
reviewSessionStart et al in tauri-bridge.ts, activeReviewSession in appStore.ts, timeline grouped by session
Automated checks pass but the gate requires a human end-to-end run: agent in PTY edits files, ReviewPanel shows changeset, approve/reject verified. Blocked on user validation session.

Phase A (M1) and Phase B implementation (B1-B5, B7) verified done against the North Star: agent work is now visible (narration) and reviewable/reversible (review surface). B6 gate blocked on human end-to-end validation. Backlog extended 07 Jul with C/D/E/launch milestones targeting v1.0 on 13 Nov 2026.
